gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.status FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.name = 'Cloudchaser Eagle'
pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT l.status FROM legalities l JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid WHERE c.name = 'Cloudchaser Eagle';
question: What is the status of card "Cloudchaser Eagle"?
